UG-116  REQUIRED MARKINGS ON NAMEPLATES. (a) The nameplate required by UG-115 shall include the following: (1) the Manufacturer's name and serial number; (2) the maximum allowable working pressure at the design temperature; (3) the minimum design metal temperature (MDMT) as determined per UCS-66; (4) the year built. (b) Additional markings shall include whether postweld heat treatment was performed in accordance with UW-28 or UCS-79. Test pressure and date shall be recorded per UG-99. Marking shall be verified by the Inspector in accordance with UG-93. See UG-117 for certification requirements.
